0.q: The content of lignin was significantly increased in CcCAD10 over-expression (OE) lines, the enhanced antioxidant enzyme activities, indicating enhanced salt resistance.

5.q: By using CcADF9 as a bait to screen an Y2H library, we identified actin depolymerizing factor-related phosphokinase 1 (ARP1), a novel protein kinase that interacts with CcADF9.

6.q: CcARP1, induced by melatonin, promotes salt resistance of pigeon pea through phosphorylating CcADF9, inhibiting its severing activity.

7.q: CcARP1, induced by melatonin, promotes salt resistance of pigeon pea through phosphorylating CcADF9, inhibiting its severing activity.

8.q: their overexpression in transgenic plants greatly enhanced salt tolerance by promoting the biosynthesis of luteolin.

9.q: F3´H is also known as a critical enzyme for luteolin biosynthesis... Overexpression of F3´H-5 in hairy roots was found to enhance the tolerance of pigeon pea to salt stress whilst knockdown of its expression reduced tolerance.

10.q: the exogenous melatonin stimulated endogenous melatonin production mainly by upregulating the expression of CcASMT2 gene.

11.q: salt stress also induced the expression of CcPCL1 and CcF3´H-5, and their overexpression in transgenic plants greatly enhanced salt tolerance by promoting the biosynthesis of luteolin.

12.q: the transcription factor CcPCL1 directly bonded to the CcF3´H-5 promoter to enhance its expression.
